test_cases.description: Documentary pitch to broadcaster head of docs

input.project: THE INVENTORY — documentary following auction house specialist cataloguing a collector's estate

test_cases.notes: Subject line professional, pitch paragraph crisp at two sentences, ask specific. No hyperbole. Closing clear.

test_cases.description: Series pitch to streaming platform acquisitions

input.project: THRESHOLD — 6-part drama series, young emergency doctors across three European cities, first year of practice
input.stage: Scripts for episodes 1-3 complete, broadcaster interest from one European partner

test_cases.notes: Series Mania reference adds warm context without overstating the connection. Script-read ask is the right level of commitment for a cold contact.

input.project: THE PAPER TRAIL — investigative podcast series, each season follows one financial fraud case through documents, interviews, and courtroom audio

test_cases.notes: Pilot-listen ask is appropriately concrete. Podcast format pitch adapts well to the email format. Slightly less strong on the subject line for audio-first projects.
